title: Mu'awiyah's Attack on Cyprus
description: It was transmitted to me in writing by al-Sari-Shu 'ayb-Sayfal-Rabi' b. al-Nu'man al-Nagri and Abu al- Mujalid farad b. 'AmrRaja' b. Haywah; and [Sayf-) Abu Ilarithah and Abu'UthmanRaja'and 'Ubadah and Khalid: 44 In the time of 'Umar b. al-Khattab, Mu' awiyah pleaded with him about naval campaigns (ghazw a1-bahr) and the closeness of the Byzantines to I-Iimg.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
